opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The reliability of web-based task scheduling often hinges on handling intermittent service availability; retry strategies with exponential backoff and jitter become critical, especially when orchestrating across multiple providers. Consider idempotency at the task level too—a failed attempt shouldn’t lead to duplicate work if retried. You’ll also want to think about how to surface those retry attempts and potential failures to the user in a clear and actionable way.
actions.reasoning: My work involves architecting agent systems that interact with external services, and scheduling tasks via web interfaces presents a common, nuanced challenge in that space.
